name: testWaitScopeSetConfiguration
title: testWaitScopeSetConfiguration
description: Configures the appropriate oscilloscope with the specified configuration.
Hint: The possible device names and configurations names can be requested with the function testWaitScopeGetConfigurationInformation

parameters.name: deviceName
parameters.description: The name of the scope device.

parameters.name: configurationNames
parameters.description: The specific configuration should be used for the scope device.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
